metadata.name: Scott Rao V60
metadata.author: Scott Rao
metadata.description: Centre-pour technique with an aggressive bloom spin (Rao Spin), two main pours separated by a 70%-drained wait, each finished with a gentle spin. Targets 22–24.5% extraction.

protocol.notes: Pour 60g, then immediately spin the bloom aggressively (Rao Spin)
Pour to 200g total. Slow, nearly-vertical stream. Circle around the slurry.
Very gentle spin to fill the ribbed channels (less than one second)
Wait until slurry is ~70% drained (visual check)
Pour to 330g total. Same slow, steady technique.
